title: Lucid Group (LCID) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Lucid Group Stock Forecast and Analyst Predictions. Price Target Summary. TipRanks aggregates analyst price targets from multiple Wall Street firms, providing consensus views and individual analyst predictions for LCID stock. The current consensus suggests significant upside from recent trading levels, though with high uncertainty. Analyst Coverage. Multiple analysts with varying ratings from Buy to Sell provide coverage of Lucid Group. Recent coverage includes input from major investment banks and research firms monitoring the company's execution and financial performance. Smart Score and Ratings. TipRanks Smart Score analyzes the stock based on technical and fundamental indicators, providing an overall rating for the stock. The current rating reflects both bullish and bearish factors affecting the stock's outlook. Stock Analysis. Detailed analysis of key metrics including valuation, growth prospects, and competitive positioning relative to other EV manufacturers.
